title: The $20,000 API Key Mistake
summary: Keith AI presents a case study of a $20,000 incident involving improper API key handling. The video serves as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage.
writeup: Keith AI walks through a case study of a $20,000 incident caused by improper API key handling. The video frames mismanaged keys as a concrete financial risk, not just a security abstraction, tying the failure directly to unexpected cost. The takeaway connects API security and cost management: poor key handling can translate into large bills when keys are exposed or misused.
